2.5.0: Added Phase 11: Native Mobile Apps (Weeks 38-40, 45 SP)

Updated all dashboard components to reflect Phase 11 and new timeline

Updated hierarchical project diagram with native mobile app sections
Shifted Phases 12-15 to accommodate native mobile development
2.3.0: Enabled Supabase Vault for encrypted secret storage
Implemented TOTP secret encryption using AES-256-GCM
Added encryption/decryption helper functions for Vault operations
Migrated existing TOTP secrets to encrypted Vault storage
Updated all MFA edge functions to use encrypted secrets
Added secure vault secret deletion on MFA disable
Enhanced security: TOTP secrets no longer stored in plaintext

Moved Change Password to Profile Information section
Added inline MFA enable/disable controls for email/password users
Added Google 2FA management guidance for OAuth users
Removed Recent Login Activity and Security Events sections
Fixed Google OAuth redirect to dashboard instead of home page
Removed Website link from navigation menu
2.1.0: Fixed MFA redirect loop issue for password-based users
Added Google 2-Step Verification instructions for OAuth users
Enhanced MFA flow with proper session handling and navigation
Improved MFA verification UX with inline and modal options
2.0.2: Migrated security headers to Cloudflare Transform Rules for optimal edge performance
Removed security headers from vercel.json (now managed in Cloudflare)

2.0.1: Added comprehensive security response headers (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, CSP, etc.)
Fixed Google OAuth users blocked from password reset attempts
Fixed TypeScript errors in SecurityDashboard component
Enhanced auto-redirect to login after password reset with email pre-fill

Fixed React hooks initialization issue in App component
2.0.0: Production authentication system v2 with enhanced security
Comprehensive rate limiting and DDoS protection
